title: TIE Fighter: Authorized Strategy Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:TIEFighterAuthorizedStrategyGuide.jpg]] |title=''TIE Fighter:
Authorized Strategy Guide'' |author=[[Corey Sandler]] |cover artist=[[Jean Bisesi]] {{C|Cover design}} |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Brady Games]] |release date=[[August 24]], [[1994]]{{Amazon|url=Tie-Fighter-Authorized-Strategy-Guide/dp/1566861861|text=Tie Fighter: Authorized Strategy Guide (Star Wars)}} |type=Paperback |pages=140 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=9781566861861 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''TIE Fighter: Authorized Strategy Guide''''' is an instruction book for the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]. It was written by [[Corey Sandler]] and published by [[Brady Games]] on [[August 24]], [[1994]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781566861861}}; [[August 24]], [[1994]]; [[Brady Games]]; US paperback ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Amazon|url=Tie-Fighter-Authorized-Strategy-Guide/dp/1566861861|text=Tie Fighter: Authorized Strategy Guide (Star Wars)}} *{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/109|text=TIE Fighter Strategy Guide}} [[Category:TIE Fighter strategy guides]]
